title: Make the autonomous-dev-homelab plugin actually operate Patrick's live homelab end-to-end and produc
description:
Make the autonomous-dev-homelab plugin actually operate Patrick's live homelab end-to-end and produce a deployable, installable build. The design corpus (PRD-001, TDD-001/002, 6 plans, 29 specs) and ~697 unit tests are complete, but NOTHING has been exercised live: the plugin has never connected to real hosts, the CLI/build have never been run for real (tsc currently fails at tests/cli/test-safety-cli.test.ts:133 with TS2493 tuple-index error), there is no deploy/packaging path, homelab connection config + secrets are unwired, and the portal panel has never been tested.

DEFINITION OF DONE: a homelab operator can install the plugin and run discover -> connect -> observe -> safety-gated autofix against the live environment:
- Docker Swarm: manager gallifrey-lab-01, worker gallifrey-lab-02 (services: Portainer, Sonarr, Radarr, SABnzbd, Authentik, nginx-proxy-manager/NPM, Postgres, OpenSearch).
- Unraid "Tower" (unraid.pwatson.space): Plex, 80TB array, autofan.
- Connection: MCP-first with SSH fallback; secrets retrieved from HashiCorp Vault (no plaintext credentials anywhere).

SCOPE:
1. Fix the build/typecheck/CLI so `npm ci && npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js --help` works end to end; add a build script and packaging so the plugin is installable as a Claude Code plugin.
2. Wire real connection + inventory against the hosts above (discovery fingerprints, MCP/SSH connect, audit log).
3. Wire configuration + Vault-backed secrets to the actual environment.
4. Make the observe -> autofix loop runnable against the live homelab while PRESERVING the safety model (destructiveness ladder, typed-CONFIRM modal, 24h delay). Destructive or live-mutating actions must default to L0 human confirmation.
5. Verify the portal panel + SSE metrics actually render for this plugin.
6. Deliver a deploy path, an operator runbook, and end-to-end verification evidence.

Keep all existing tests green and add live/integration coverage where it can be done safely. Do not weaken or bypass the safety gates to make live operations pass.
